---
title: "Information Geometry: The Geometry of Statistical Models"
subtitle: "CROSS-004 | Cross-Cutting Methods"
description: "Statistical models form a manifold. The Fisher information metric gives this manifold a Riemannian structure. Information geometry unifies statistical inference, machine learning optimization, and thermodynamics through differential geometry."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Information Geometry: The Geometry of Statistical Models

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
